visa_types.name: Renewal of Adult passport due to loss
visa_types.visa_fees: [Table:  Renewal of Adult passport due to loss]
visa_types.overview:
Documents Required
- Police report in original and photocopy (where the loss of the document is detailed).
- Dominican cédula with new Biometric Format and Photocopy.
- Original Birth certificate and copy (issued in the last 4 years).
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- The information in the Birth Certificate and ID must match (Names, Surnames, Date of Birth)
visa_types.full_text:
## Documents Required
- Police report in original and photocopy (where the loss of the document is detailed).
- Dominican cédula with new Biometric Format and Photocopy.
- Original Birth certificate and copy (issued in the last 4 years).
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- The information in the Birth Certificate and ID must match (Names, Surnames, Date of Birth)

## Fees

[Table:  Renewal of Adult passport due to loss]

## Photo and fingerprints specifications
As a part of your passport renewal application, your digital photograph will be taken and you will need to provide the fingerprint of one finger in the following order: index, thumb, middle, ring or little finger.

visa_types.name: Renewal of Adults Passport due to damage

Documents Required

- The information in the Birth Certificate and ID must match (Names, Surnames, Date of Birth)

visa_types.name: Passport renewal for Adults
visa_types.overview:
Documents Required
- Dominican cédula with new Biometric Format and photocopy.
- Original birth certificate and copy (issued in the last 4 years)
- Expired passport and photocopy of the first page where the photo is displayed.
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- The information in the Birth Certificate and ID must match (Names, Surnames, Date of Birth)

- Original birth certificate and copy (issued in the last 4 years)
- Expired passport and photocopy of the first page where the photo is displayed.
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- The information in the Birth Certificate and ID must match (Names, Surnames, Date of Birth)

As a part of your passport renewal application, your digital photograph will be taken and you will need to provide the fingerprint of one finger in the following order: index, thumb, middle, ring or little finger.

visa_types.name: Passport renewal for minors
visa_types.overview:
Documents Required
Note: the minor must be present, with one of the Parents or Legal Guardian.
																		
- Most recent Dominican ID (Cédula de Identidad y Electoral) with new biometric format of the Parent or Legal guardian accompanying the minor and Photocopy.
- Birth Certificate of the minor and copy (issued in the last 4 years).
- Expired passport and photocopy of the first page where the photo is displayed.
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- Legal document proving guardianship or power of attorney if the responsible adult is not a parent. In case of power of attorney, the Dominican ID of the parent and the proxy is needed as well as the signature of one of the parents.
visa_types.full_text:
## Documents Required
Note: the minor must be present, with one of the Parents or Legal Guardian.
																		
- Most recent Dominican ID (Cédula de Identidad y Electoral) with new biometric format of the Parent or Legal guardian accompanying the minor and Photocopy.
- Birth Certificate of the minor and copy (issued in the last 4 years).
- Expired passport and photocopy of the first page where the photo is displayed.
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- Legal document proving guardianship or power of attorney if the responsible adult is not a parent. In case of power of attorney, the Dominican ID of the parent and the proxy is needed as well as the signature of one of the parents.

## Fees

[Table:  Passport renewal for minors]

## Photo and fingerprints specifications
As a part of your passport renewal application, your digital photograph will be taken and you will need to provide all your fingerprints.

visa_types.name: Lost Passport for minors
visa_types.overview:
Documents Required
- Police report in original and Photocopy (where the loss of the document is detailed).
- The minor must be present, accompanied by the Parents or Legal Guardian.
- Most recent Dominican ID (Cédula de Identidad y Electoral) with new biometric format of the Parent or Legal guardian accompanying the minor and Photocopy.
- Birth Certificate of the minor and copy (issued in the last 4 years).
- Biometrics (Photo, Fingerprints and signature) will be captured at the VFS Global - Dominican Passport Renewals Center. Jewelry and accessories such as earrings, necklace, piercings, are not allowed, hair accessories cannot be visible, forehead and ears must be clearly visible.
- Legal document proving guardianship or power of attorney if the responsible adult is not a parent. In case of power of attorney, the Dominican ID of the parent and the proxy is needed.

visa_types.name: Passport Services
visa_types.overview:
The Dominican passport book is biometric, with all the security and reliability guarantees suggested by the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) for passports, it is issued for six (6) years. The passport is essential to travel to the Dominican Republic and to be duly identified.
OBSERVATIONS
																			
- The passport application must be made in person and within business hours.
- If the passport is for a minor, it must be requested by one of the parents or their legal representative.
- For any service, consular offices are authorized to include additional requirements to those indicated in this document.
- Consular offices have the right to refuse to manage a service, if the consular staff doubts its usefulness for the citizen; if they think that such service may harm the applicant's future interests; if the citizen does not provide the required documents; or if you question the public faith of the Consular Office.
- This Passport renewals center has an additional fee requirement
visa_types.full_text:
Information about starting your application

## Overview
The Dominican passport book is biometric, with all the security and reliability guarantees suggested by the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) for passports, it is issued for six (6) years. The passport is essential to travel to the Dominican Republic and to be duly identified.
OBSERVATIONS
																			
- The passport application must be made in person and within business hours.
- If the passport is for a minor, it must be requested by one of the parents or their legal representative.
- For any service, consular offices are authorized to include additional requirements to those indicated in this document.
- Consular offices have the right to refuse to manage a service, if the consular staff doubts its usefulness for the citizen; if they think that such service may harm the applicant's future interests; if the citizen does not provide the required documents; or if you question the public faith of the Consular Office.
- This Passport renewals center has an additional fee requirement
